series_metadata.series_description: The Database Backup Files are tape backups of Database 2 (DB2) and Structured Query Language (SQL) Server Workers Compensation application databases needed to restore a system in case of a disaster or inadvertent destruction.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain the daily backups on-site for 14 days, and then destroy. Send copies of the daily backups to an off-site storage facility, retain for 14 days, and then destroy., Electronic: Erase
